heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 21011 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2101136 App.:5909., , .Aug. 13, 1998Pub. L. 105–231, § 9112 Stat. 1532The words “officers and agents” are substituted for “officers, directors, employees, and agents” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.
